titleStmt.title: SII 26.300: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 300. (A.R. No. 285 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: The king is described as one ‘who was pleased to take Madurai, Īḻam, and the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya’. This inscription records a gift of two sandhi lamps to the same temple in the same Tirukkachchūr, made by a certain Āyiluḻāṉ Āḷuḍaiyāṉ Kākkunāyakkaṉ of Uṟattūr in Kōṉādi-nāḍu in Śeṅgāṭṭukkōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍāśōḻa-maṇḍalam. It is stated that he gave 24 sheep to provide ghee for the lamps to the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple and that these sheep were received by a certain Śāmik-kōṉāṉ Kākkunāyakka-kōṉāṉ, son of maṉṟāḍi Māḍak-kōṉāṉ of Tirukkachachūr itself, who had agreed to measure out two nāḻi of ghee monthly.

The inscription also records that the same Śāmik-kōṉāṉ Kākkunāyakkakōṉāṉ had previously received 12 sheep from the temple treasury to provide ghee for a sandhi lamp, and that he had agreed to measure out one nāḻi of ghee monthly in this connection. The measure used to measure out the ghee is called Irāśakēsari.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalai yuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulot
tuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupatteṭṭāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kaḷattūṟ koṭṭattuc ceṅkuṉ
ṟanāṭṭut tirukkaccūrt tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiya nāyaṉārkku Immaṇṭalattuc ceṅkāṭṭukoṭṭattuk koṉātinā
ṭṭu Uṟattūrāyiluḻāṉ Āḷuṭaiyāṉ kākkunāyakkaṉ vaitta cantiviḷakku Iraṇṭukkum Ikkoyir kāṇiyuṭaiya civappirā
maṇar vacam viṭṭa Āṭu Irupattunālum Ittirukkaccūrilirukkum maṉṟāṭi māṭattāṉ makaṉ cāmikkoṉāṉ kākkunāyakka
koṉāṉ Ivarkaḷ pakkal nāṉ kaikkoṇṭu mātam Oṉṟukku cela virācakecariyāle Irunāḻi ney can
tirātittavarai muṭṭāmal Aḷakkakkaṭavenākac cammatittuc cilālekai paṇṇikkuṭutte
ṉ maṉṟāṭi māṭattāṉ cāmikkoṉāṉ kākkunāyakkakoṉeṉ nāṉ muṉṉāḷil Iṉṉāyaṉār cipaṇṭārattu santi viḷakku O
ṉṟukkuk kaikkoṇṭa Āṭu paṉṉiraṇṭukkum mātam Oṉṟukku Iṉṉāḻiyāl Aḷakkum ney nāḻiyāka viḷakku muṉ
ṟum cantirātittavarai celuttuveṉākac cilālekai paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ Itu paṉmākecurarakṣai §§
Digital edition of SII 26.300 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
